text.heading: RENEWAL R ..................... FORM (E)
text.p: The Renewal Fee is 5O,- €uro and payment should be made in Cash at the Passport Office of application.
Where all available space on a passport is already occupied by visas, application must be made on Form C 1. for the issue of a New Passport, and the full Fee of 90,- €uro is chargeable.
The maximum "life" of a Passport is 10 years from the date of initial issue.
text.heading: RENEWAL OF PASSPORT
text.p: I the Undersigned, (a).....(a) Forenames and Surname in full ( Surname in Block Capitals).
at present residing at..................
hereby make application for the renewal of British or Nigerian Passport No..
issued to me at..., .... on the.....

for a further period of (b)......(b) insert number of years (not exceeding five) for which it is desired the Passport shall be renewed provided that the total period of validity of ten years is not exceeded)
.......................... years, for the purpose of travelling to
I declare that I am a (c)......(c) Insert "Citizen Of Nigeria" "Citizen of Nigeria by naturalisation", etc. as the case may be.
.....and I have not lost that national status, and I solemnly declare that the whole of the particulars given by me in respect of this application are true, both in substance and in fact.
I further declare that I have no other Passport in my possession.

p.footnote: Postage stamps will not be accepted in payment.
Passports which have been in existence for ten years or which contain no further space for visas are not renewable and the holders must apply for the grant of new Passports.

text.p: *And I the Undersigned (d). (d) Name and Qualification of person verifying the Declaration who should himself be a Citizen of Nigeria viz: - Government Official, Banker, Minister of Religion, Barrister-at-law, Physician, Surgeon, Solicitor, or other responsible person, giving professional or business adress.

p.footnote: Recommendations from members or officials of Banking Firms should bear the printed stamp of the Bank here below.

text.p: of................................._.....................................................................here by declare that, to the best of my personal knowledge and belief, the above declaration of the said
is true, and that I can from my personal Knowledge of him/her vouch him/her as a fit and proper to receive a Passport.
text.heading: IMPORTANT
text.p: Applicants, and persons recommending them are warned that should any of the statements contained in their respective declarations prove to be untrue, they will render themself is liable to prosecution.
text.heading: CAUTION
text.p: *The attention of persons who are asked to sign this declaration is specially called to the fact that it can only be signed from personal knowledge of the applicant and not from information obtained from other persons.
text.heading: RENEWAL
text.p: BEARER OF PASSPORT (The following particulars should be given in the handwriting of the bearer of the Passport)
Domicile or ordinary place of residence.............
Present address...............
Present age and whether married or single..........
Profession or Occupation..................
* Place and date of birth......................

For Persons Born Abroad, who derive Nigerian Citizenship from one parent who is a Nigerian Citizen (To be struck out in other cases) my (his) father paternal grandfather having been born in Nigeria at.....................on the.....................day of
If bearer is a married woman or widow:
Place and date of birth of husband........................
(b) Particulars of Children if included on Passport:
Forenames: Surname: Date and place of birth: Sex:
Note. - Children who have attained the age of 16 years require separate Passports.
text.heading: PARTICULARS OF CHILD/CHILDREN (under the age of 5 years) TO BE ADDED TO PASSPORT
text.p: WHERE ISSUED DATE OF ISSUE
Please add the particulars of the above-named child/children to above-mentioned passport.

This form must be signed by the father or other legal guardian of the child or children. When the marriage of the parents has been divorced or in any case when someone other than the father signs the application, evidence of the legal guardianship should be produced by the applicant.
The birth certificate(s) should accompany this application.
Signed...
Relationship to child/children...
Present address...
Date...
